zotero.abstractNote: We present HDHumans, a novel hybrid approach for high-fidelity digital human synthesis. Our method combines the benefits of explicit geometry representations with the expressive power of neural rendering. Specifically, we propose a hybrid representation that consists of a coarse mesh proxy and a learned neural texture field. The mesh proxy provides a strong geometric prior, while the neural texture field captures fine-scale details and view-dependent effects. We demonstrate that our approach can synthesize high-fidelity digital humans from sparse multi-view input, and that it generalizes well to novel poses and viewpoints. Our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in terms of visual quality and geometric accuracy.
